headline: Elevance Health Advances Efforts to Close Critical Gaps in Mental Health Care
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, May 04, 2026--Despite growing awareness, mental health concerns remain difficult to navigate and often lead to avoidable crises, costly emergency room visits, and long-term strain on individuals, families, and an already overburdened healthcare system. With nearly one in five Americans experiencing a diagnosable mental health condition each year, the need for funding and systemic improvement has never been greater.

headline: Acadia Healthcare Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Rising Patient Days
summary: ACHC Q1 tops estimates with 37 cents EPS and 7.6% revenue growth, driven by higher patient days and admissions despite shorter stays and rising costs.

raw.headline: Acadia Healthcare Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Rising Patient Days

headline: Select Medical Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Higher Expenses
summary: SEM's Q1 EPS misses due to higher expenses and weaker patient days, even as revenues top estimates and rehab segment growth partly offsets pressure.

raw.headline: Select Medical Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Higher Expenses
raw.summary: SEM's Q1 EPS misses due to higher expenses and weaker patient days, even as revenues top estimates and rehab segment growth partly offsets pressure.

headline: TDOC Q1 Earnings Miss, Revenues Down Y/Y on BetterHelp Weakness
summary: Teladoc Health posts a y/y narrower Q1 loss and beats revenue estimates as international growth and cost cuts offset BetterHelp weakness and subscription declines.
